description_long: This sculpture depicts a group of three human figures, likely representing a family, rendered in a realistic style. The central figures are an adult male and female, seated back-to-back on a broad, elevated base, with the male holding an object in his hand and the female gazing forward. A child sits at the front, positioned lower and between the adults, with hands resting on their lap and head slightly bowed. The figures are intricately detailed, with visible facial features, clothing folds, and textured hair, all carved from a uniform stone material. The base is blocky and geometric, providing stability and a sense of monumentality to the composition. The overall surface is matte and slightly rough, with a weathered gray coloration typical of outdoor stone sculptures.
description: A realistic stone sculpture of three human figures, likely a family, seated together on a blocky base. The group features detailed facial expressions and clothing, with a weathered gray finish.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all three figures clearly, with the child seated at the front and the adults behind, facing slightly apart.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the male figure's profile and the child seated below, with the female figure partially visible behind.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the adult figures and the top of the child's head, emphasizing the sculpture's depth and arrangement.
description_view_3: Angled rear view focusing on the female figure's back and the side of the child, with the male figure's profile visible.
attribute_location_context: No specific environmental context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
